stories.title: Implement user authentication API
stories.description: Create a REST API for user authentication with JWT tokens, supporting login, registration, and token refresh.
acceptance_criteria: Given valid credentials, When POST /auth/login, Then return JWT token with 200
Given invalid credentials, When POST /auth/login, Then return 401 with error
Given expired token, When POST /auth/refresh, Then return new JWT token with 200
Given no token, When GET /auth/me, Then return 401

stories.title: Add rate limiting middleware
stories.description: Implement token bucket rate limiting for API endpoints to prevent abuse.
acceptance_criteria: Given a client exceeding 100 requests/minute, When any API call, Then return 429 with Retry-After header
Given a client within limits, When any API call, Then proceed normally
